data.body: Triggered overlays T1-T12 ship as library prompts (reviewers/plan_review_T*.md). registry.overlay_triggers fires low-FP DETERMINISTIC set (T5a/T5d/T7/T12); rest LLM-ROUTED via route_criteria; agent-tier overlays one agent each. FP6 anti-FP encoded in T2. Unit-tested. verify-completion: PASS.
